_meta.instrument: Open Enneagram of Personality Scales (OEPS v1.0), Open-Source Psychometrics Project
_meta.full_name: Open Enneagram of Personality Scales (OEPS v1.0), Open-Source Psychometrics Project
_meta.license: Creative Commons per OSPP project policy (About page confirms 'a creative commons license'); the specific BY-NC-SA 4.0 variant is INFERRED from a sibling page and is NOT printed on the OEPS artifacts
_meta.attribution: Open Enneagram of Personality Scales (OEPS v1.0), Open-Source Psychometrics Project (anonymous author/maintainer). Creative Commons (specific variant not printed on artifacts; treat as BY-NC-SA).
_meta.cautions: REFERENCE ONLY. 36 Likert items, 4 per type, all positively keyed. Treat as CC NonCommercial+ShareAlike (variant uncertain) → do NOT reproduce/rewrite commercially without confirming the license with the author. Useful as a structural model for authoring ORIGINAL Enneagram items.

scoring_key.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (36 Likert items, 1-5, all positively keyed)
scoring_key.note: Higher summed rating = stronger match to that type; type with highest score is the assigned type.

verification.summary: adversarially fact-checked by a second agent against primary sources (deepinme research workflow, 2026-07) — 36/36 items verbatim-accurate vs publisher ODT; license certainty flagged down from the research draft

sources.title: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
sources.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — no per-page notice; see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I am a perfectionist.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — no per-page notice; see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I strive for efficiency.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I often have to redo other peoples work.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I keep my belongings in order.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: My relationships with others are what my life is about.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I have difficulty saying no.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I get lots of satisfaction from helping others achieve their goals.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I put family first.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I put work first.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I like to stand out.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: It is good to wake up to a full day of planned activities.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: Money is important to my happiness.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I daydream about being in love.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I really enjoy feeling bitter sweet.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I cry.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I side with the rebels over the establishment.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I have a hard time showing emotions.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I spend hours alone with my hobbies.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I spend most of my time trying to understand things.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I like mental challenges.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: Fear of being taken advantage of keeps me from being more trusting.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I get input from others before I make a decision.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I conform.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I am loyal.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I must always be having new experiences.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I can keep a conversation going with anyone about anything.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I am uninhibited.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I always try to break the tension with a good joke.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I naturally emerge as a leader.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I like a conversation where no one agrees.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I want people to tell me the truth, not spare my feelings.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I prefer it when leaders are decisive.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: When other people are arguing, I leave the room.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I keep my thoughts to myself, to prevent trouble.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I am very accepting and flexible.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)

items.instrument: OEPS v1.0 (Open Enneagram of Personality Scales)
items.text: I avoid confrontation.
items.license: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (OSPP project policy; inferred — see licensing_notes)
